title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you play any musical instrument? How long have you been playing?
What kind of music can't you stand? Why?
Do you think music education in schools is important?
Have you ever been to a live concert? What was the experience like?
What type of art do you enjoy most – music, film, writing or painting?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think music can genuinely change the world?
Is it more valuable for young people to learn a musical instrument than other activities?
Do you think arts education in schools is given enough importance?
